title: Strategies for international marketing
summary: 9609 A Level — export, licensing, joint ventures, and global branding.
learningObjectives: Evaluate global marketing for case MNCs.

simpleExplanation.title: Selling across borders
simpleExplanation.summary: Firms may export, franchise, form alliances, or invest abroad. Marketing mix may be adapted per country or unified globally.

sections.content: **International marketing** (8.2.3) links **6.1.6 international PESTLE**. Compare **standardisation vs localisation**.
